mapper.sql: id, form_key, title, description, schema_json, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from sys_form_catalog where form_key = #{formKey} limit 1
select from sys_form_catalog order by updated_at desc nulls last, id desc
select from sys_form_catalog where status = #{status} order by updated_at desc nulls last, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_form_catalog (form_key, title, description, schema_json, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{formKey}, #{title}, #{description}, #{schemaJson}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update sys_form_catalog set form_key = #{formKey}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, schema_json = #{schemaJson}, status = #{status}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}

where.if: and ( form_key ilike concat('%', #{query.normalizedKeyword}, '%') or title ilike concat('%', #{query.normalizedKeyword}, '%') or description ilike concat('%', #{query.normalizedKeyword}, '%') )
